variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 8056 Air Filter | Replaces the Sakura SA-257V
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 8056 Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-257V. Easy to install and replace, the SA 8056 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
